description.en: A community initiative addressing hunger in Touwsriver, providing meals to 800-850 residents twice weekly and running community gardens.

description.de: A community initiative addressing hunger in Touwsriver, providing meals to 800-850 residents twice weekly and running community gardens.

name: Compassionate Hearts (Touwsrivier)
entityDescription: A nonprofit organization providing daily meals to 950-1000 people and running community development projects in Touws River, South Africa.
